creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: feld
Date: Fri Oct  5 13:45:30 UTC 2018
New revision: 481275
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/481275

Log:
  Scribus is a desktop publishing program, similar to Adobe PageMaker(TM),
  QuarkXPress(TM) or Adobe InDesign(TM).

  Scribus offers support for professional publishing features, such
  as CMYK color, easy PDF creation, Encapsulated Postscript import/export
  and creation of color separations.

  WWW: http://www.scribus.net

  PR:		211751

Changes:
  head/print/Makefile
  head/print/scribus-devel/
  head/print/scribus-devel/Makefile
  head/print/scribus-devel/distinfo
  head/print/scribus-devel/pkg-descr
  head/print/scribus-devel/pkg-plist
